name: Beet Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and wash the beets. Leave a 1-inch stem. Steam until tender.
2. When cooked, slip off the skins under cool water and set aside.
3. Remove leaves from stems and discard stems.
4. Wash and dry the beet greens; chop coarsely.
5. In a skillet, cook onions, banana pepper, and garlic in 1/3 cup olive oil until softened.
6. Add beet greens and cook for 5 to 7 minutes.
7. Transfer to a food processor and puree with the cooked beets cut into quarters.
8. Add the rest of the ingredients and puree again, adding more olive oil if necessary.
9. Store refrigerated for up to 2 weeks or freeze. You can add Parmesan cheese if desired.
